created.title: Resource created successfully
created.description: The resource has been created successfully.

updated.title: Resource updated successfully
updated.description: The resource has been updated successfully.

deleted.title: Resource deleted successfully
deleted.description: The resource has been deleted successfully.

validation.title: Validation failed
validation.description: One or more fields are invalid.

bad_request.title: Bad request
bad_request.description: The request could not be processed.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: You need to be authenticated to access this resource.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to access this resource.

not_found.title: Resource not found
not_found.description: The requested resource does not exist.

conflict.title: Conflict
conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

too_many_requests.title: Too many requests
too_many_requests.description: You have made too many requests. Please try again later.

timeout.title: Request timeout
timeout.description: The request took too long to complete.

request_timeout.title: Request timeout
request_timeout.description: The request took too long to complete.

limit_reached.title: Limit reached
limit_reached.description: You can create at most {maximum} items. Remaining: {remaining}. Requested: {requested}.

limit_context_user.title: Invalid user limit context
limit_context_user.description: The user context required to evaluate the limit could not be resolved. Expected field: {field}.

limit_context_parent.title: Invalid parent limit context
limit_context_parent.description: The parent context required to evaluate the limit could not be resolved. Expected field: {field}.

limit_parent_entity_not_found.title: Parent entity not found
limit_parent_entity_not_found.description: The parent entity required to evaluate the limit could not be found.

limit_tree_depth_reached.title: Tree depth limit reached
limit_tree_depth_reached.description: The maximum allowed depth for this hierarchical structure has been reached.
